Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end
Fed Decision April 2026: Key Takeaways From Decision to Hold Rates Steady - Bloomberg

summary: FOMC voted 8-4 to hold rates at 3.5-3.75% on April 29. Third consecutive hold. Inflation elevated partly from energy prices. Historic 4-dissenter split (last since Oct 1992). Powell's tenure ending; Kevin Warsh nominated as successor. Markets pricing in no cuts rest of 2026 into 2027.
